title: Bitcoin miner Riot turns to net profit in Q2 as cost to mine bitcoin doubles year-over-year
text: Riot Platforms turned to net profitability in Q2 2025 despite a doubling in cost to mine bitcoin year-over-year. The company's strategic focus on efficiency and revenue diversification through power curtailment credits and other initiatives offset the increased mining costs. Total revenue showed strong growth driven by increased bitcoin prices and continued operational progress. The doubling of mining costs reflected increased network difficulty and higher energy prices, challenges faced across the bitcoin mining industry. However, Riot's superior operational efficiency and large-scale advantages allowed the company to maintain profitability despite these headwinds. The company continued deployment of mining hash rate while also pivoting toward data center infrastructure opportunities. Strong cash position and bitcoin holdings provided a financial cushion for ongoing capital investments and facility expansions.
